# copick stats

*Gather statistics about a copick project.*

## Usage

```bash
copick stats [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Description

Statistics commands for Copick.

This group contains commands for gathering statistics about Copick project entities.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`meshes`](meshes.md) | Display statistics about meshes. |
| [`picks`](picks.md) | Display statistics about picks. |
| [`segmentations`](segmentations.md) | Display statistics about segmentations. |
